name: airtouch5py

metadata.name: airtouch5py
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# airtouch5py
Python client for the airtouch 5

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.zone_name.ZoneNameRequestData.zone_number
documentation: None for all

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_ability.AcAbility.supports_fan_speed_quiet
documentation: quite in docs

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_ability.AcAbilityRequestData.ac_number
documentation: None to request the ability of all ACs

classes.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_client.Airtouch5Client

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_client.Airtouch5Client.connect
documentation:
Connect to the airtouch 5.
Times out after 5 seconds.
Throws if we fail to connect.
Otherwise puts a connected message in the queue and starts up the reader task.

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_client.Airtouch5Client.disconnect
documentation:
Disconnect the socket if it is connected.
If stop_reader_task is true, also stop the reader task (Normally you should do this, unless called from the reader task)
Pushes a DISCONNECTED message in to the queue if we actually disconnected (were connected before)

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_client.Airtouch5Client._read_packets
documentation:
Continuously read packets from the socket and put them in the queue.
If we detect the socket has died, disconnect it

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_client.Airtouch5Client.send_packet
documentation:
Send the given packet to the airtouch 5.
Throws if we aren't connected or if there is a connection issue

The "Raw" (Hard mode) Airtouch 5 Client.
You should probably use Airtouch5SimpleClient instead.

Usage:
Construct, call connect.
Wait on packets_received to receive a CONNECTED message.
Wait on updates from packets_received, use send_packet to send packets.

Call disconnect to disconnect.

When a DISCONNECTED message is received, call connect to reconnect.

classes.name: airtouch5py.packets.zone_control.ZoneControlData
documentation:
Zone control messages are to control all zones. Each message to AirTouch is to control one or more specific zones.
AirTouch will respond a message with sub type 0x21. (Zone status message)

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_control.SetPowerSetting.CHANGE_ON_OFF_STATUS
documentation: Does this mean toggle?

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_control.SetAcFanSpeed.SET_TO_QUIET
documentation: "Quite" in the docs

classes.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_control.AcControlData
documentation:
AC control messages are to control all ACs. Each message to AirTouch is to control one or more specific ACs.
AirTouch will respond a message with sub type 0x23. (AC status message)

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_status.AcStatus.ac_setpoint
documentation: Other: Not available

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.ac_status.AcStatus.temperature
documentation: Other: Not available

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.zone_status.ZoneStatusZone.set_point
documentation: 0xFF invalid (None)

class_variables.name: airtouch5py.packets.zone_status.ZoneStatusZone.temperature
documentation: Temperature > 150 invalid (None)

classes.name: airtouch5py.packets.zone_status.ZoneStatusData
documentation:
Send this message to AirTouch without any sub data (data length: 0x00 0x08, repeat count: 0x00, repeat length: 0x00) to request zone status from AirTouch.
Note: AirTouch will send a zone status message automatically when zone status is changed.

classes.name: airtouch5py.packet_reader.PacketReader

methods.name: airtouch5py.packet_reader.PacketReader.read
documentation: Read the data and return a list of packets.
Provide the bytes received from the airtouch 5 socket, and this class will find the packets, decode them, and return them.

variables.name: airtouch5py.packet_encoder._calculator
documentation: type: ignore

classes.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient.test_connection
documentation:
Connect, verify the connection, disconnect.
Throws if something goes wrong.

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient.connect_and_stay_connected
documentation:
Connect, and reconnect if we disconnect.
Gets the AC ability and zone names, initial zone status and ac status, and then waits for updates.
Throws if we fail to make the initial connection.

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient._wait_for_packet_or_throw
documentation: Wait 5 seconds for a packet of the given type, or throw if we disconnect or timeout.

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient._maintain_connection
documentation:
Read messages off the queue, reconnecting if we disconnect.
Calls the matching callbacks.

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient.send_packet
documentation: Send a packet.

methods.name: airtouch5py.airtouch5_simple_client.Airtouch5SimpleClient.disconnect
documentation: Disconnect, and stop reconnecting.

A simple Airtouch5 client.

Usage:
Call connect_and_stay_connected().
Add listeners to *_callbacks
The Airtouch5 will automatically send out updates to zone status and ac status as they happen.

classes.name: airtouch5py.packet_decoder.PacketDecoder
documentation:
Decode packets from the AirTouch 5 protocol.
Assumes that they have already been validated (CRC, data length)
